goal: Add a durable runtime-card handoff receipt that binds a runtime-card artifact to its paired runtime-evidence-bundle artifact with freshness, head SHA, expiry, and repository-contained file proof.

deepModuleBoundary.primaryModule: src/lib/runtime runtime-card handoff support plus runtime packet contracts
forbiddenFiles: public closeout authority outside runtime-card handoff output
raw prompts, transcripts, secrets, or token values

nonGoals: Do not make runtime-card handoff evidence sufficient for closeout, CI, review-thread, Linear, merge-readiness, or goal-completion claims.
Do not introduce a second runtime-card command family or broad cockpit surface.
Do not persist raw runtime-card event streams, prompts, transcripts, or secret-bearing environment data.
Do not mutate Codex source; Codex remains read-only context for this slice.
implementationApproach: Define runtime-card-handoff/v1 as a compact receipt over an already-written runtime-card/v1 artifact and its paired runtime-evidence-bundle/v1 artifact.

Add repository-contained path, size, sha256, freshness, generatedAt, expiresAt, headSha, sourceRefs, provenanceRefs, shared runtime identity, evidenceUse, and blocker fields so future sessions can classify stale or missing handoffs deterministically.

Require the runtime-card artifact and runtime-evidence-bundle artifact to share the same issue key, head SHA, generated timestamp, and producer/run binding before the handoff can be written; reject same-head but cross-run pairings.
Expose the receipt through the existing runtime-card command as an optional --handoff-out path that requires both --out and --evidence-out, keeping runtime-card as the narrow cockpit producer.
Publish JSON Schema, an example, and runtime packet manifest validation for the new handoff receipt.
Update stale goal routing metadata so the current active cockpit no longer tells the next agent to push an already-pushed PU-027 slice.
riskControls: Runtime-card handoff evidenceUse must remain orientation or audit_trail only.
The handoff writer must reject repo-escaping paths through the existing repo-runtime-artifact helpers.
The handoff must record both file size and sha256 so prose-only artifact claims cannot pass as durable proof.
The handoff must include source-reference/provenance fields that point back to the runtime-card and runtime-evidence-bundle sources rather than relying on path and checksum alone.
The handoff must record expiry and headSha so stale cards can orient future work without supporting closeout claims.
validationPlan: Negative test: reject a handoff where runtime-card and runtime-evidence-bundle artifacts have the same head SHA but different generatedAt or producer/run binding.
Negative test: reject any handoff or schema example that attempts evidenceUse=claim_support or otherwise presents the handoff as closeout authority.

pnpm exec biome check src/lib/runtime/runtime-card-handoff.ts src/lib/runtime/runtime-card-handoff.test.ts src/commands/runtime-card.ts src/commands/runtime-card-args.ts src/commands/runtime-card-options.ts src/commands/runtime-card.test.ts contracts/runtime-card-handoff.schema.json contracts/examples/runtime-card-handoff.example.json contracts/runtime-packet-schemas.manifest.json src/dev/validate-runtime-packet-schemas-script.test.ts

rollback: Remove runtime-card handoff helper and tests.
Remove --handoff-out parser and CLI writer support.
Delete generated artifacts/runtime-card-handoff sample outputs if produced locally.
